title: viola × schoenachii
intro: Viola × schoenachii, also known as the hybrid pansy, is a cross between Viola x wittrockiana and Viola tricolor, resulting in a unique and attractive flowering plant. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its anthocyanins and flavonoids, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola × schoenachii include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and provide relief from anxiety and stress. In herbal preparations, Viola × schoenachii is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support overall well-being and promote a sense of calm.
